mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(report_no, 11) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) FROM expense_report WHERE report_no LIKE CONCAT('BX', #{datePrefix}, '%')
SELECT id, report_no, emp_id, total_amount, expense_type, invoice_url, description, status, create_time, update_time FROM expense_report WHERE emp_id = #{empId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
